variants.title: HiFi Filter SAH 03C12ADP002 Complete Air Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAH 03C12ADP002 Complete Air Filter
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SAH 03C12ADP002 Complete Air Filter is HiFi's replacement to the Virgis SAH03C12ADP002. Easy to install and replace, the SAH 03C12ADP002 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
